languages.text: "Умоляю, спасите моего сына! Вы ведь можете его спасти, правда? Мальчик выживет?"

traits.locale_text: "Умоляю, спасите моего сына! Вы ведь можете его спасти, правда? Он выживет?.."

languages.text: "I beg you, save my son! You can save him, can't you? Will the boy survive?"
languages.original_text: "Умоляю, спасите моего сына! Вы ведь можете его спасти, правда? Мальчик выживет?"

traits.locale_text: "I beg you, save my son! You can save him, can't you? Will the boy survive?"
"I beg you, save my son! You can save him, can't you? Will the boy survive?"
"I beg you, save my son! You can save him, can't you? Will the boy survive?"

languages.text: 「どうか、息子を助けてください！助けることはできますよね？息子は生き残れますか？」
languages.original_text: "I beg you, save my son! You can save him, can't you? Will the boy survive?"

languages.text: "Yalvarırım oğlumu kurtarın! Onu kurtarabilirsiniz, değil mi? Çocuk yaşayacak mı?"
languages.original_text: "I beg you, save my son! You can save him, can't you? Will the boy survive?"

traits.locale_text: "Yalvarırım oğlumu kurtarın! Onu kurtarabilirsiniz, değil mi? Çocuk yaşayacak mı?"

languages.text: “求您救救我儿子！您一定能救他，对不对？这孩子能活下来吗？”
languages.original_text: "I beg you, save my son! You can save him, can't you? Will the boy survive?"

traits.locale_text: “求您救救我儿子！您一定能救他，对不对？这孩子能活下来吗？”

languages.text: "Ich flehe Euch an, rettet meinen Sohn! Ihr könnt ihn doch retten, oder? Wird der Junge überleben?"
languages.original_text: "I beg you, save my son! You can save him, can't you? Will the boy survive?"

traits.locale_text: "Ich flehe Euch an, rettet meinen Sohn! Ihr könnt ihn doch retten, oder? Wird der Junge überleben?"

languages.text: « Sauvez mon fils, je vous en supplie ! Vous pouvez le sauver, n’est-ce pas ? Il va survivre ? »
languages.original_text: "I beg you, save my son! You can save him, can't you? Will the boy survive?"

traits.locale_text: « Sauvez mon fils, je vous en supplie ! Vous pouvez le sauver, n’est-ce pas ? Il va survivre ? »

languages.text: «¡Se lo ruego, salve a mi hijo! Puede salvarlo, ¿verdad? ¿El muchacho sobrevivirá?».
languages.original_text: "I beg you, save my son! You can save him, can't you? Will the boy survive?"

traits.locale_text: «¡Se lo ruego, salve a mi hijo! Puede salvarlo, ¿verdad? ¿El muchacho sobrevivirá?».
